title: Eye on the Future
scenario: Design a futuristic-looking concept art piece for a new virtual reality experience. The piece should incorporate elements that reflect the experience's focus on space exploration. It should be designed to be displayed at a large format (at least 4x6 feet).
constraints: Must be designed using 3D modeling software
Must be scalable to at least 4x6 feet

evaluationCriteria.description: The concept art piece should demonstrate a high level of creativity and artistic merit.
The concept art piece should remain visually appealing when scaled up to 4x6 feet.
The concept art piece should be designed using 3D modeling software and meet the scalability constraint.
